# Embedded Hardware & Test Automation

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| Arduino | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| MiniProg | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| UART / CAN / USB-to-Ethernet | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| ADB / Fastboot | Expert | ⬜ Pending |
| Physical Device Test Farm | Expert | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- Hardware-in-the-loop CT infrastructure architecture
- Automated power sequencing and flashing orchestration
- Physical device test farm operations and fleet management
- Serial communication (UART, CAN) for device control
- ADB/Fastboot automation for Android device management
- Radmoon peripheral integration for SoC testing
